title: Latency Check
command:
printf '== Ping 1.1.1.1 ==
'; ping -c 4 -W 2 1.1.1.1; printf '
== Ping 8.8.8.8 ==
'; ping -c 4 -W 2 8.8.8.8; printf '
== Parsed Averages ==
'; for host in 1.1.1.1 8.8.8.8; do avg="$(ping -c 4 -W 2 "$host" | awk -F'/' '/^rtt|^round-trip/ {print $5}')"; printf 'AVG_MS=%s
' "${avg:-unknown}"; done
notes: Run a compact latency check against two stable public targets and print normalized AVG_MS markers for summary parsing.
